creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
After updating nvidia-settings to 304.51, it does not build anymore with the following error:
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/tmp/obj/media/dvlfiles/build/ports/x11/nvidia-settings/work/nvidia-settings-304.51/src'
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/tmp/obj/media/dvlfiles/build/ports/x11/nvidia-settings/work/nvidia-settings-304.51/samples'
cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=core2 -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DNV_BSD  -I/usr/local/include -I ../src/libXNVCtrl -c nv-control-info.c -o _out/FreeBSD_amd64/nv-control-info.o && cc -MM -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=core2 -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DNV_BSD  -I/usr/local/include -I ../src/libXNVCtrl nv-control-info.c | sed -e "s,: ,: $\(wildcard ," -e "s,\([^\\]\)$,\1)," -e "s;^nv-control-info.o: ; _out/FreeBSD_amd64/nv-control-info.o: ;" > _out/FreeBSD_amd64/nv-control-info.d
cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=core2 -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DNV_BSD  -I/usr/local/include -I ../src/libXNVCtrl  -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L ../src/libXNVCtrl  -o _out/FreeBSD_amd64/nv-control-info _out/FreeBSD_amd64/nv-control-info.o -lXNVCtrl -lXext -lX11
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lXext
gmake[1]: *** [_out/FreeBSD_amd64/nv-control-info] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/tmp/obj/media/dvlfiles/build/ports/x11/nvidia-settings/work/nvidia-settings-304.51/samples'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /media/dvlfiles/build/ports/x11/nvidia-settings.

How-To-Repeat: Update ports to latest version and try to build ports/x11/nvidia-settings
